name: Versailles Savings And Loan Company
description_short: Versailles Savings & Loan is a traditional savings bank offering deposit accounts, loans, and online banking services. They focus on home financing for buyers, movers, and remodeling projects.
description_long:
Versailles Savings & Loan is a traditional savings and loan institution operating under the parent company Versailles Financial Corp. Based on their website presence and service offerings, they function as a community-focused financial institution providing standard banking products and services to retail customers. The company maintains an active online presence with internet banking capabilities and security-focused customer education.

The institution offers deposit accounts (savings and checking products implied by their category), consumer loans, and mortgage lending services with particular emphasis on home financing. They advertise themselves as a resource for customers buying new homes, relocating, or undertaking remodeling projects. Online banking features are available with new user registration and login functionality, suggesting digital-first banking convenience.

Versailles Savings & Loan distinguishes itself through an emphasis on customer security and fraud prevention education. Their website contains detailed guidance on online debit card safety, verification code protection, and warnings about scam tactics—suggesting they prioritize customer awareness over aggressive sales tactics. They maintain a physical location with specific hours and a phone line for customer contact, indicating a hybrid banking model with both digital and in-person services.

The primary limitation is that their website provides minimal specific detail about loan products, interest rates, fees, or deposit account terms. While they reference 'Current Rates' and 'Financial Calculators,' the actual products and competitive terms are not disclosed in available web content. This is a traditional regional bank, not a high-tech neobank, which may appeal to customers preferring established institutions but may lack the features or rates of larger national competitors. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking and internet banking platform
pros: Offers online banking with new user registration and password recovery options for digital convenience
Provides home financing specifically positioned for purchase, relocation, and remodeling scenarios
Maintains physical branch location with posted hours and direct phone support
Emphasizes customer security education with detailed fraud prevention guidance and scam warnings
Operates under established parent company Versailles Financial Corp., suggesting regulatory compliance
Offers financial calculators to help customers plan purchases
Provides check reordering services and multiple deposit account types
cons: Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APY, or loan terms—customers must contact directly to compare
No transparent fee structure disclosed for accounts, loans, or services
Limited online product information restricts ability to self-serve or research before applying
best_for: Homebuyers seeking mortgage financing with personalized service
Customers preferring traditional banks with physical branch locations over online-only neobanks
Individuals relocating or remodeling who want a single institution for checking, savings, and home loans
diagnosis: Versailles Savings & Loan is best for customers seeking traditional community banking with mortgage expertise and in-person service, particularly those financing home purchases or improvements. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing and product details online—customers will need to contact the bank directly to compare rates and terms against national competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
